seo.title: The robots.txt + llms.txt Punch List | Content Cucumber
seo.meta_description: Free checklist for AI search visibility. Audit your site for robots.txt and llms.txt, know which AI crawlers to allow or block, and publish a spec-compliant llms.txt that AI systems can actually read.
seo.og_description: Free AI visibility checklist. Five-step punch list with robots.txt + llms.txt templates, AI crawler allow/block decisions, and a quarterly maintenance plan.

thankyou.title: Check your inbox
thankyou.text: The robots.txt + llms.txt Punch List is on its way. You'll receive a download link within a few minutes.

data.title:
The robots.txt + llms.txt
Punch List
data.subtitle: Five steps. Copy-paste templates. AI-ready in an afternoon. Follow this checklist and end up ahead of 90% of sites.
bullets: Find out in 60 seconds whether your site is invisible to AI search or already ahead of the curve
Copy the robots.txt template that names every major AI crawler: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Amazonbot, Applebot-Extended, and more
See the allow-search vs block-training decision most sites get wrong by default, with the one-line rule you actually want
Get a spec-compliant llms.txt template that AI systems can parse, plus the six mistakes that quietly break the file for everyone else
Learn the before/after test that shows exactly how ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity answer 'what is your company?' once the files go live
Build a quarterly maintenance cadence so new AI crawlers never catch you flat-footed again
data.authors: Content Cucumber writes for brands that want AI systems to represent them accurately. This punch list is the same checklist we work through before publishing any client's robots.txt and llms.txt.
data.form_subtitle: Free. Checklist plus templates. Delivered to your inbox.
